title: chiara-speech2text_schema-inputs
description: Schema for inputs inside inputs.json. 'Inputs' are words and phrases for which the user with impaired speech will generate audios

inputs_id.description: Unique identifier for the inputs set (e.g. title). It can be a UUID or any unique string

inputs_emoji.description: Emoji representing the inputs set. It can be used in the frontend to visually differentiate sets of inputs

inputs.description: List of inputs. Each input is a word or phrase for which the user will generate audios

input.description: The word or phrase for which the user will generate audios
